WARNING: This power sequence is for A2779_S (820-02841, X2523/MLB_S) ONLY.
description: Boot power-on sequence for M2 Pro MacBook Pro 14-inch. Sequence starts from USB-C cable insertion and ends at display LOGO. More complex than A2681 due to Austringer VR and 3 CLVR instances.

sequence.name: USB-C Cable Insertion — 5V Default
sequence.action: USB-C cable inserted. Charger provides default 5V on VBUS.
sequence.ic: UF400 (CD3217 ATC0) or UF500 (ATC1) or UF600 (ATC2)
sequence.what_happens: CD3217 internal MOSFET passes 5V. Output via charger input path.
sequence.next_trigger: CD3217 detects 5V on VBUS → begins CC communication

sequence.name: PPCON_ACNSW — Charger Input Active
sequence.action: Charger input path enabled. PPCON_ACNSW feeds charger IC.
sequence.what_happens: Charger IC begins regulating input → generates PPBUS_AON

sequence.name: PPBUS_AON Established
sequence.action: Main power bus comes up. If battery connected, PPBUS_AON ≈ 12.6V.
sequence.prerequisite: BMU SYS_DETECT circuit (J5150/U5150 gasket, BLKAMPMHY CRITICAL) must enable

sequence.name: PP3V8_AON — SVR AON Powers Up
sequence.action: U5700 3-phase buck converts PPBUS_AON → PP3V8_AON (3.8V, 30A max).
sequence.delay: 3.8V VR enable delayed by circuit on page 30 (DELAY FOR 3.8V VR ENABLE / BYPASSED option)
sequence.next_trigger: PP3V8_AON present → SPMU (U7700) and MPMU (U8100) begin startup

sequence.name: SPMU & MPMU Startup — PMU Rails Cascade
sequence.action: Both PMUs receive PP3V8_AON and begin generating output rails in hardware-defined sequence.
sequence.next_trigger: All S2/S1 rails stable → enables standalone VRs and Austringer

sequence.name: UC259 (5V) Powers Up + Austringer Starts
sequence.action: 5V standalone buck enabled by PMU. Austringer VR begins generating high-current SoC rails.

sequence.name: CLVR Rails — Dynamic SoC Domains Power Up
sequence.action: 3 CLVR instances enable SoC PCPU, GPU SRAM, and ANE SRAM domains.

sequence.name: M2 Pro Hard Start Complete — SoC Commands CD3217
sequence.action: M2 Pro SoC has completed OTP verification and hard start. SoC sends command to CD3217 via internal bus.
sequence.what_happens: CD3217 reads ROM information from SPI ROM, negotiates PD 20V

sequence.name: PD Negotiation — 20V Boost
sequence.action: CD3217 uses CC line to communicate PD Source_Capabilities with charger. Requests 20V.
what_happens: CD3217 sends PD request via CC line
PPBUS_AON stabilises at battery voltage with full power

sequence.name: Soft Start — SSD, BIOS, Display
sequence.action: M2 Pro SoC reads SSD NAND, loads iBoot, enables display.
what_happens: SoC reads dual SSD via NAND interface (pages 100-109)
Display power sequencer (UP710/UP730/UP701) enables panel rails (page 114)
